## Description

Provide a clear and concise description of the changes in this pull request.

**Related Issue:** #(issue number if applicable)

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] New component addition (skills, agents, or rules)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactoring (no functional changes)
- [ ] Performance improvement

## Component Details (if applicable)

**Component Type:**
- [ ] Skill (SKILL.md)
- [ ] Agent (AGENT.md)
- [ ] Rule (*.md)

**Category:** [e.g., security, web-frontend, cloud, etc.]

**Number of Components Added:** [e.g., 65 skills, 4 agents, 10 rules]

**Source Repository:** [URL of original repo if applicable]

**Original License:** [e.g., MIT, Apache 2.0, etc.]

## Checklist

### For All Changes

- [ ] I have read the contributing guidelines
- [ ] My code follows the project's style guidelines
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own work
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas
- [ ] I have made corresponding changes to the documentation
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings
- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix is effective or that my feature works (if applicable)
- [ ] New and existing unit tests pass locally with my changes

### For Component Additions

- [ ] All components are Qoder-compliant (proper frontmatter, required fields)
- [ ] Original source and author are documented in component frontmatter
- [ ] Original license is preserved and documented
- [ ] Components are placed in the correct category directory
- [ ] No duplicate components exist
- [ ] Components have been tested for proper formatting

### For Documentation Changes

- [ ] Documentation builds successfully (if applicable)
- [ ] Changes are clear and concise
- [ ] No spelling or grammatical errors
- [ ] Links are valid and point to correct resources

## Testing

Describe the tests you ran to verify your changes:

1. [Test 1 - e.g., "Verified SKILL.md frontmatter parses correctly"]
2. [Test 2 - e.g., "Checked component loads in Qoder IDE"]
3. [Test 3 - e.g., "Validated category assignment"]

**Test Results:**
- Components validated: [number]
- Components failed: [number]
- Issues found: [list any issues or "none"]

## Screenshots (if applicable)

Add screenshots to help explain your changes.

## Additional Context

Add any other context about the pull request here.

### Attribution

If adding components from external sources, confirm:

- [ ] Original LICENSE file is preserved
- [ ] ATTRIBUTION.md has been updated with new sources
- [ ] Component frontmatter includes source URL and author
- [ ] No copyright violations introduced

### Breaking Changes

If this is a breaking change, describe:

- What breaks
- Migration path for users
- Reason for the breaking change

---

## Reviewer Notes

Please verify:

- [ ] Code quality and adherence to standards
- [ ] Component compliance with Qoder format
- [ ] License and attribution correctness
- [ ] No security vulnerabilities introduced
- [ ] Documentation accuracy
